title: Offer other clinical services ValueSet Display Values
description: Display values for Offer other clinical services ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

HIV.C.DE159.en: Hepatitis B virus (HBV) and hepatitis C virus (HCV) testing and treatment

HIV.C.DE160.en: Co-trimoxazole chemoprophylaxis to prevent pneumocystis carinii pneumonia

HIV.C.DE161.en: Intensified TB case finding and linkage to TB treatment

HIV.C.DE162.en: Provision of isoniazid preventive therapy if person does not have TB

HIV.C.DE163.en: Malaria prevention (such as bed nets and prophylaxis), depending on epidemiology
